text:
By Obaloluwa Joshua, LAGOS

Nigeria forward, Gift Orban has joined Ligue 1 club, Olympic Lyon for €13m.

Orban joined the former Ligue 1 champions from Belgian Pro League outfit, KAA Gent.

The 21-year-old signed a contract until 2028.

The forward joined Gent from Norwegian second division club, Stabaek in January 2023.

Orban registered 20 goals in 22 appearances for the club in the second half of last seasonn

He has  slowed down this season with 12 goals in 30 appearances for the Buffalos.READ ALSO:

Lyon, who are battling with relegation occupy 16th position on the Ligue 1 table.
